raw.subject: Your Warner Robins page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I've been following Golden Nails and Spa's Facebook page, and I love the variety of services you offer, from pedicures to waxing and gel polish. It's great to see such a diverse menu of options for the Warner Robins community.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which may be leaving potential customers who prefer to book appointments or learn more about your services online unable to do so.

I sketched out a simple homepage idea based on the photos and posts you share on Facebook, which includes a services menu, a work gallery showcasing your talented nail artists, and a prominent booking CTA with your hours and location.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/golden-nails-and-spa-warner-robins

I'd love to discuss this idea further and answer any questions you may have. Replying to this email or a quick call to (your phone number) would be a great place to start.
